vocab.loading: Use useNavigation().state for pending UI. Deferred data with defer() + Await component + React Suspense fallback.
vocab.forms: Use <Form> component for progressive enhancement. Action functions handle POST. useActionData() returns action result.
vocab.api: loader() for GET data fetching. action() for mutations. Both run server-side in the same route file.
vocab.authentication: Session storage with createCookieSessionStorage. commitSession/destroySession in loader/action.
vocab.error: ErrorBoundary export per route for error isolation. useRouteError() to access thrown errors or responses.
